APHRODITEANCIENT-APHRODITE_ANCIENT.title: Aphrodite
How lovely running into you again, gorgeous!
Why, you look positively stunning in all that silver light!
Between us goddesses, may you kill everybody standing in your way!
As long as you have love in your heart, you'll probably be fine!
Such a beautiful night for such an ugly job you have to do!
Even in bad times, we can find something to love!
Life would be so very dull if not for our personal problems, hm?
Oh, if only looks could kill, gorgeous!
So good running into you again, sweetness!
I do so love these nightly outings that we share!
So much fighting and bloodshed, all on our family's account!
There must be something I can do to help, isn't there, love?
The more distracted you can make them, the easier they are to kill!
Ohh, how I've longed for your arrival, beautiful!
We're just two lovely goddesses together having a night out!
Try as they might, don't ever let them get to you, sweetness.
I found you once again, gorgeous! Oh, this is always fun!
You're beautiful such as it is. Though, I can still be of some benefit, I'm sure!
Whoever's on your bad side, love, they're on mine as well.
You witches can be such elusive sorts, though I know just where to find you!
At this rate, you'll end up breaking more hearts than me!
Mm, you witches get to have all the fun, don't you?
Please spare a thought for me, cooped up as ever on this mountaintop...
Finally! I was beginning to think you stood me up, gorgeous!
Oh I've been longing for this ever since our last such little date!
Have I got just the thing for you this time, sweetness!
Why hello, beautiful! And may my sweetest blessing be with you.
Wherever you may go, there's always drama waiting for you, isn't there?
May my blessings lift you like sweet nothings whispered in your ear.
I had the strongest urge to see you once again, and here you are, at last!
We're in this together, sweetness, and don't you forget it, hm?
Why, hello, gorgeous! You look like you can break some hearts even without my aid! Oh, your brother would be so proud, knowing you're fighting for your kin!
